description_long: This is an L-shaped office desk with a spacious wooden surface and a sturdy metal frame. The main section features a large rectangular work area, while the return section extends perpendicularly, providing additional workspace. On one end, there is an integrated pedestal with three drawers, each equipped with a metal handle, offering organized storage. The desk's legs and drawer unit are finished in a light gray color, contrasting with the warm wood tone of the desktop. The design is modern and functional, suitable for professional environments. The overall construction appears robust, with clean lines and a practical layout for office tasks.
description: A modern L-shaped office desk with a wood-finished top, gray metal legs, and a three-drawer pedestal for storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad wooden desktop and the black modesty panel beneath the main work surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the L-shape, the extended return, and the solid gray side of the drawer pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full L-configuration and the back of the drawer unit.
description_view_3: View from the drawer side, clearly showing the three drawers with handles and the open leg space under the main desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the open leg space and modesty panel, while the drawers are positioned to the user's left for easy access.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or executive office desk
